description: Tab strip component with Line, Pill, and Enclosed visual variants. Supports icons, badges, disabled tabs, and keyboard arrow-key navigation. Use with TmTabPanel children.

parameters.name: ActiveTabId
parameters.description: ID of the currently active tab.

parameters.name: ActiveTabIdChanged
parameters.description: Fires when the active tab changes.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant of the tab strip.
